portfolioRule: Each first-entry signal cycle is equally weighted and held for a fixed number of valid individual-stock trading days.

calculationDisclosure.weighting: Daily equal weight among active first-entry signals.
calculationDisclosure.cashHandling: Sessions with no active signal are omitted and treated as cash.
calculationDisclosure.benchmarkAlignment: The first invested session uses that session's TAIEX open; subsequent contiguous invested sessions use prior TAIEX close.
calculationDisclosure.missingPrices: No stock or benchmark price is forward-filled.

holding5.weightingRule: Each active first-entry signal has equal weight on each invested session.
holding5.rebalancingAssumption: Daily equal weighting among active signals.
holding5.costScope: Net return includes configured entry and exit costs only; no additional intraday slippage or daily rebalancing cost is assumed.
holding5.missingPriceRule: A held position with an official no-trade or unknown-coverage session invalidates the aggregate curve; prices are never carried forward.

holding20.weightingRule: Each active first-entry signal has equal weight on each invested session.
holding20.rebalancingAssumption: Daily equal weighting among active signals.
holding20.costScope: Net return includes configured entry and exit costs only; no additional intraday slippage or daily rebalancing cost is assumed.
holding20.missingPriceRule: A held position with an official no-trade or unknown-coverage session invalidates the aggregate curve; prices are never carried forward.
